messages.content:
帮我翻译一下这些话：
  
“As interaction progresses, the model’s suggestions become increasingly conditioned on accumulated interaction signals, leading to higher predictability of user intent rather than relaxed acceptance criteria.”
  
“An apparent improvement in acceptance and editing metrics over time should not be interpreted as a relaxation of evaluation criteria.  
Our controlled analyses suggest that it primarily reflects the model’s increasing ability to anticipate user intent under a stable interaction protocol.  
This co-adaptive dynamic is precisely what the HitL-MDP abstraction is designed to capture.”

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="4">
<summary>Thought for 4 seconds</summary>
> 这段话看起来是关于人机交互和机器学习模型的学术讨论。让我逐句翻译：
> 
> 第一段：
> "As interaction progresses, the model's suggestions become increasingly conditioned on accumulated interaction signals, leading to higher predictability of user intent rather than relaxed acceptance criteria."
> 
> 随着交互的进行，模型的建议越来越多地基于累积的交互信号进行调整，这导致了对用户意图更高的可预测性，而不是放宽了接受标准。
> 
> 第二段：
> "An apparent improvement in acceptance and editing metrics over time should not be interpreted as a relaxation of evaluation criteria."
> 
> 随着时间推移，接受度和编辑指标的明显改善不应被解释为评估标准的放宽。
> 
> "Our controlled analyses suggest that it primarily reflects the model's increasing ability to anticipate user intent under a stable interaction protocol."
> 
> 我们的对照分析表明，这主要反映了模型在稳定的交互协议下，预测用户意图的能力不断提高。
> 
> "This co-adaptive dynamic is precisely what the HitL-MDP abstraction is designed to capture."
> 
> 这种共同适应的动态机制正是HitL-MDP抽象所要捕捉的。
> 
> 让我整理一下完整的翻译。
</details>
以下是翻译：

**第一段：**
"随着交互的进行，模型的建议越来越多地受到累积交互信号的影响，这带来的是对用户意图更高的可预测性，而非评估接受标准的放宽。"

**第二段：**
"接受率和编辑指标随时间推移而出现的明显改善，不应被解释为评估标准的放宽。

我们的对照分析表明，这主要反映的是模型在稳定交互协议下，预测用户意图的能力不断增强。

这种共同适应的动态机制，正是 HitL-MDP（人在环路马尔可夫决策过程）抽象模型所要捕捉的核心内容。"

---

**核心含义解释：**
这段话在说明：模型表现变好不是因为用户"放水"了，而是因为模型通过不断学习用户的交互习惯，真正提高了理解和预测用户需求的能力。这种人机相互适应的过程，正是他们研究框架想要建模的。
